Our Story

Who We Are

The Roman Union is one of the most organized and formidable guilds in Kingdom Life II. We rise from the legacy of the great empire disciplined, united, and unyielding in the face of adversity.

Founded on the principles of Roman military excellence, we have built a community of loyal warriors who fight as one, protect each other, and carve our name into the history of the realm.

Whether you are a seasoned veteran of many wars or a fresh recruit eager to prove your worth, there is a place for you beneath our crimson and gold banner.


Join the Legion

What We Stand For

The Roman Creed

Valor in Battle

We fight with precision and courage. Every Roman soldier stands firm in the face of danger, never retreating without reason.

Brotherhood

No man fights alone under our banner. We protect our own and forge unbreakable bonds between members of the legion.

Honor & Loyalty

Our word is our bond. We do not betray allies, we do not abandon our posts, and we uphold the name of the Roman Union always.

Order & Discipline

Rome was built on structure. We follow a clear hierarchy and operate with military precision in all guild activities.

Dominance

We do not settle for second place. The Roman Union competes to win territory, wars, and the respect of every rival guild.

Growth

Every recruit has the opportunity to rise through the ranks. Merit, dedication, and service are rewarded with power and prestige.

Guild Structure

Ranks of the Legion

Rank Title Role Level
Augustus Emperor Supreme ruler of the Roman Union absolute authority over all Leader
Augusta Empress Co-ruler alongside the Augustus, equal in command Leader
Dux Duke / War Commander Supreme military commander, leads the legion in war Command
High Command Senior General Top-tier officers overseeing guild strategy and diplomacy Officer
Senior Command Senior Officer Experienced officers managing guild operations and members Officer
Junior Command Junior Officer Rising officers proving their leadership in the field Officer
Milites Elite Soldier Seasoned veterans who have earned distinction in battle Elite
Legionary Full Member Proven soldiers who have sworn loyalty to the Roman Union Member
Plebeian Recruit New initiates earning their place among the legion Recruit
Roma Citizen Members of the Roman community the foundation of the empire Citizen

Enlistment

Requirements

We Seek

  • Active players who log in regularly
  • Willingness to participate in wars and guild events
  • Respectful and mature attitude toward all members
  • Team players who support their fellow legionaries
  • Loyalty to the guild above all else
  • Any experience level new and veteran players welcome
  • Interest in roleplay and Kingdom Life II lore

We Will Not Tolerate

  • Betrayal or spying for rival guilds
  • Disrespecting fellow Roman Union members
  • Abandoning battles without notice
  • Toxic behavior or harassment in-game
  • Sharing guild strategies with outsiders
  • Going rogue without officer approval

Military Structure

Regiments

Every soldier of the Roman Union belongs to a regiment — a specialized combat unit with its own role on the battlefield. Choose your weapon, choose your regiment.

Equites

The horsemen of the legion. Swift, mobile cavalry who strike fast and retreat before the enemy can respond.

𓍝

Sagitarrii

The archers of Rome. Masters of ranged combat who rain arrows upon enemy formations from a distance.

Legionnaire

The pikemen — the iron spine of the Roman line. They hold the front, absorb punishment, and push enemies back.

Organized PvP

The Five Teams

To fix the chaos during rallies and improve our PvP performance, every member must join one of the five teams. Each team has its own leader and fights as a coordinated unit — no more random pile-ins.

⚔
WRM
West Roma
☦︎
EURM
Eastern United Roman States
𓍝
CRM
Celtic Roman Imperium
𓃗
SRM
State of Roma
𖤓
IRM
Imperium of Roma
Purpose
Organized rallies and faster deployment
Structure
Each team has its own dedicated leader
Usage
Primarily PvP combat and war events

Sacred Emblems

Symbols of the Guild

Every great empire is known by its symbols. These two emblems represent the twin pillars upon which the Roman Union stands.

Symbol of Bravery

The cross of crimson and gold, crowned by seven stars a testament to the courage of every Roman soldier who stands against all odds. Those who wear this mark have proven themselves fearless in battle.

Unity's Eagle

The golden eagle of unity, flanked by four crimson stars at the cardinal points representing the four corners of the empire bound as one. Where the eagle soars, the Roman Union stands undivided.

Our Heritage

The Roman Legacy

The Roman Union draws its identity from the greatest empire the world has ever known. From Italy to Anatolia, from the Balkans to the Levant we carry that legacy into every battle of Kingdom Life II.

Historical territory of the Roman Empire the foundation of our guild's identity
